phase.description: The phase of an assistant message. Use `commentary` for an intermediate assistant message and `final_answer` for the final assistant message. For follow-up requests with models like `gpt-5.3-codex` and later, preserve and resend phase on all assistant messages. Omitting it can degrade performance. Not used for user messages.

engine.description: Which search engine to use. "auto" (default) uses native if the provider supports it, otherwise Exa. "native" forces the provider's built-in search. "exa" forces the Exa search API. "firecrawl" uses Firecrawl (requires BYOK). "parallel" uses the Parallel search API.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return per search call. Defaults to 5. Applies to Exa, Firecrawl, and Parallel engines; ignored with native provider search.

video_url.description: A base64 data URL or remote URL that resolves to a video file

phase.description: The phase of an assistant message. Use `commentary` for an intermediate assistant message and `final_answer` for the final assistant message. For follow-up requests with models like `gpt-5.3-codex` and later, preserve and resend phase on all assistant messages. Omitting it can degrade performance. Not used for user messages.

Inputs.description: Input for a response request - can be a string or array of items

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. "America/New_York"). Defaults to UTC.

DatetimeServerTool.description: OpenRouter built-in server tool: returns the current date and time

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return per search call. Defaults to 5.

max_total_results.description: Maximum total number of search results across all search calls in a single request. Once this limit is reached, the tool will stop returning new results.

WebSearchServerTool_OpenRouter.description: OpenRouter built-in server tool: searches the web for current information

TextExtendedConfig.description: Text output configuration including format and verbosity

ReasoningConfig.description: Configuration for reasoning mode in the response

DataCollection.description:
Data collection setting. If no available model provider meets the requirement, your request will return an error.
- allow: (default) allow providers which store user data non-transiently and may train on it

- deny: use only providers which do not collect user data.

ProviderSort.description: The provider sorting strategy (price, throughput, latency)

by.description: The provider sorting strategy (price, throughput, latency)

partition.description: Partitioning strategy for sorting: "model" (default) groups endpoints by model before sorting (fallback models remain fallbacks), "none" sorts all endpoints together regardless of model.

ProviderSortConfig.description: The provider sorting strategy (price, throughput, latency)

PercentileThroughputCutoffs.description: Percentile-based throughput cutoffs. All specified cutoffs must be met for an endpoint to be preferred.

PreferredMinThroughput.description: Preferred minimum throughput (in tokens per second). Can be a number (applies to p50) or an object with percentile-specific cutoffs. Endpoints below the threshold(s) may still be used, but are deprioritized in routing. When using fallback models, this may cause a fallback model to be used instead of the primary model if it meets the threshold.

PercentileLatencyCutoffs.description: Percentile-based latency cutoffs. All specified cutoffs must be met for an endpoint to be preferred.

PreferredMaxLatency.description: Preferred maximum latency (in seconds). Can be a number (applies to p50) or an object with percentile-specific cutoffs. Endpoints above the threshold(s) may still be used, but are deprioritized in routing. When using fallback models, this may cause a fallback model to be used instead of the primary model if it meets the threshold.

WebSearchEngine.description: The search engine to use for web search.

PDFParserEngine.description: The engine to use for parsing PDF files. "pdf-text" is deprecated and automatically redirected to "cloudflare-ai".

ContextCompressionEngine.description: The compression engine to use. Defaults to "middle-out".

example.name: get_weather
example.description: Get the current weather in a location

image_config.description: Provider-specific image configuration options. Keys and values vary by model/provider. See https://openrouter.ai/docs/features/multimodal/image-generation for more details.

modalities.description: Output modalities for the response. Supported values are "text" and "image".

allow_fallbacks.description:
Whether to allow backup providers to serve requests
- true: (default) when the primary provider (or your custom providers in "order") is unavailable, use the next best provider.
- false: use only the primary/custom provider, and return the upstream error if it's unavailable.

require_parameters.description: Whether to filter providers to only those that support the parameters you've provided. If this setting is omitted or set to false, then providers will receive only the parameters they support, and ignore the rest.

zdr.description: Whether to restrict routing to only ZDR (Zero Data Retention) endpoints. When true, only endpoints that do not retain prompts will be used.

enforce_distillable_text.description: Whether to restrict routing to only models that allow text distillation. When true, only models where the author has allowed distillation will be used.

order.description: An ordered list of provider slugs. The router will attempt to use the first provider in the subset of this list that supports your requested model, and fall back to the next if it is unavailable. If no providers are available, the request will fail with an error message.

only.description: List of provider slugs to allow. If provided, this list is merged with your account-wide allowed provider settings for this request.

ignore.description: List of provider slugs to ignore. If provided, this list is merged with your account-wide ignored provider settings for this request.

quantizations.description: A list of quantization levels to filter the provider by.

sort.description: The sorting strategy to use for this request, if "order" is not specified. When set, no load balancing is performed.

allOf.description: Price per million completion tokens
Price per image
Price per audio unit
Price per request

max_price.description: The object specifying the maximum price you want to pay for this request. USD price per million tokens, for prompt and completion.

provider.description: When multiple model providers are available, optionally indicate your routing preference.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the auto-router plugin for this request. Defaults to true.

allowed_models.description: List of model patterns to filter which models the auto-router can route between. Supports wildcards (e.g., "anthropic/*" matches all Anthropic models). When not specified, uses the default supported models list.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the web-search plugin for this request. Defaults to true.

include_domains.description: A list of domains to restrict web search results to. Supports wildcards (e.g. "*.substack.com") and path filtering (e.g. "openai.com/blog").

exclude_domains.description: A list of domains to exclude from web search results. Supports wildcards (e.g. "*.substack.com") and path filtering (e.g. "openai.com/blog").

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the file-parser plugin for this request. Defaults to true.
Set to false to disable the response-healing plugin for this request. Defaults to true.
Set to false to disable the context-compression plugin for this request. Defaults to true.

plugins.description: Plugins you want to enable for this request, including their settings.

route.description: **DEPRECATED** Use providers.sort.partition instead. Backwards-compatible alias for providers.sort.partition. Accepts legacy values: "fallback" (maps to "model"), "sort" (maps to "none").

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, which helps distinguish between different users of your app. This allows your app to identify specific users in case of abuse reports, preventing your entire app from being affected by the actions of individual users. Maximum of 256 characters.

session_id.description: A unique identifier for grouping related requests (e.g., a conversation or agent workflow) for observability. If provided in both the request body and the x-session-id header, the body value takes precedence. Maximum of 256 characters.

trace.description: Metadata for observability and tracing. Known keys (trace_id, trace_name, span_name, generation_name, parent_span_id) have special handling. Additional keys are passed through as custom metadata to configured broadcast destinations.

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather in a given location

MessagesResult.description: Non-streaming response from the Anthropic Messages API with OpenRouter extensions

content.text: Hello! I'm doing well, thank you for asking.

MessagesStartEvent.description: Event sent at the start of a streaming message

MessagesDeltaEvent.description: Event sent when the message metadata changes (e.g., stop_reason)

MessagesStopEvent.description: Event sent when the message is complete

MessagesContentBlockStartEvent.description: Event sent when a new content block starts

MessagesContentBlockDeltaEvent.description: Event sent when content is added to a content block

MessagesContentBlockStopEvent.description: Event sent when a content block is complete

MessagesStreamEvents.description: Union of all possible streaming events

engine.description: Which search engine to use. "auto" (default) uses native if the provider supports it, otherwise Exa. "native" forces the provider's built-in search. "exa" forces the Exa search API. "firecrawl" uses Firecrawl (requires BYOK). "parallel" uses the Parallel search API.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return per search call. Defaults to 5. Applies to Exa, Firecrawl, and Parallel engines; ignored with native provider search.

max_total_results.description: Maximum total number of search results across all search calls in a single request. Once this limit is reached, the tool will stop returning new results. Useful for controlling cost and context size in agentic loops.

search_context_size.description: How much context to retrieve per result. Defaults to medium (15000 chars). Only applies when using the Exa engine; ignored with native provider search.

user_location.description: Approximate user location for location-biased results.

allowed_domains.description: Limit search results to these domains. Supported by Exa, Parallel, and most native providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI). Not supported with Firecrawl or Perplexity.

excluded_domains.description: Exclude search results from these domains. Supported by Exa, Parallel, Anthropic, and xAI. Not supported with Firecrawl, OpenAI (silently ignored), or Perplexity.

MessagesWebSearchServerTool.description: OpenRouter built-in server tool: searches the web for current information

effort.description: How much effort the model should put into its response. Higher effort levels may result in more thorough analysis but take longer. Valid values are `low`, `medium`, `high`, or `max`.

format.description: A schema to specify Claude's output format in responses. See [structured outputs](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/structured-outputs).

MessagesOutputConfig.description: Configuration for controlling output behavior. Supports the effort parameter and structured output format.

allow_fallbacks.description:
Whether to allow backup providers to serve requests
- true: (default) when the primary provider (or your custom providers in "order") is unavailable, use the next best provider.
- false: use only the primary/custom provider, and return the upstream error if it's unavailable.

require_parameters.description: Whether to filter providers to only those that support the parameters you've provided. If this setting is omitted or set to false, then providers will receive only the parameters they support, and ignore the rest.

zdr.description: Whether to restrict routing to only ZDR (Zero Data Retention) endpoints. When true, only endpoints that do not retain prompts will be used.

enforce_distillable_text.description: Whether to restrict routing to only models that allow text distillation. When true, only models where the author has allowed distillation will be used.

order.description: An ordered list of provider slugs. The router will attempt to use the first provider in the subset of this list that supports your requested model, and fall back to the next if it is unavailable. If no providers are available, the request will fail with an error message.

only.description: List of provider slugs to allow. If provided, this list is merged with your account-wide allowed provider settings for this request.

ignore.description: List of provider slugs to ignore. If provided, this list is merged with your account-wide ignored provider settings for this request.

quantizations.description: A list of quantization levels to filter the provider by.

allOf.description: The sorting strategy to use for this request, if "order" is not specified. When set, no load balancing is performed.

session_id.description: A unique identifier for grouping related requests (e.g., a conversation or agent workflow) for observability. If provided in both the request body and the x-session-id header, the body value takes precedence. Maximum of 256 characters.

trace.description: Metadata for observability and tracing. Known keys (trace_id, trace_name, span_name, generation_name, parent_span_id) have special handling. Additional keys are passed through as custom metadata to configured broadcast destinations.

speed.description: Controls output generation speed. When set to `fast`, uses a higher-speed inference configuration at premium pricing. Defaults to `standard` when omitted.

excluded_domains.description: Exclude search results from these domains. Supported by Exa, Parallel, Anthropic, and xAI. Not supported with Firecrawl, OpenAI (silently ignored), or Perplexity.

ChatWebSearchShorthand.description: Web search tool using OpenAI Responses API syntax. Automatically converted to openrouter:web_search.

name.description: Function name (a-z, A-Z, 0-9, underscores, dashes, max 64 chars)

description.example: Get the current weather for a location

parameters.description: Function parameters as JSON Schema object

example.name: get_weather
example.description: Get the current weather for a location

ChatFunctionTool.description: Tool definition for function calling (regular function or OpenRouter built-in server tool)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a location

echo_upstream_body.description: If true, includes the transformed upstream request body in a debug chunk at the start of the stream. Only works with streaming mode.

ChatDebugOptions.description: Debug options for inspecting request transformations (streaming only)

allow_fallbacks.description:
Whether to allow backup providers to serve requests
- true: (default) when the primary provider (or your custom providers in "order") is unavailable, use the next best provider.
- false: use only the primary/custom provider, and return the upstream error if it's unavailable.

require_parameters.description: Whether to filter providers to only those that support the parameters you've provided. If this setting is omitted or set to false, then providers will receive only the parameters they support, and ignore the rest.

zdr.description: Whether to restrict routing to only ZDR (Zero Data Retention) endpoints. When true, only endpoints that do not retain prompts will be used.

enforce_distillable_text.description: Whether to restrict routing to only models that allow text distillation. When true, only models where the author has allowed distillation will be used.

order.description: An ordered list of provider slugs. The router will attempt to use the first provider in the subset of this list that supports your requested model, and fall back to the next if it is unavailable. If no providers are available, the request will fail with an error message.

only.description: List of provider slugs to allow. If provided, this list is merged with your account-wide allowed provider settings for this request.

ignore.description: List of provider slugs to ignore. If provided, this list is merged with your account-wide ignored provider settings for this request.

quantizations.description: A list of quantization levels to filter the provider by.

allOf.description: The sorting strategy to use for this request, if "order" is not specified. When set, no load balancing is performed.
Price per million completion tokens
Price per image
Price per audio unit
Price per request

max_price.description: The object specifying the maximum price you want to pay for this request. USD price per million tokens, for prompt and completion.

provider.description: When multiple model providers are available, optionally indicate your routing preference.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the auto-router plugin for this request. Defaults to true.

allowed_models.description: List of model patterns to filter which models the auto-router can route between. Supports wildcards (e.g., "anthropic/*" matches all Anthropic models). When not specified, uses the default supported models list.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the web-search plugin for this request. Defaults to true.

include_domains.description: A list of domains to restrict web search results to. Supports wildcards (e.g. "*.substack.com") and path filtering (e.g. "openai.com/blog").

exclude_domains.description: A list of domains to exclude from web search results. Supports wildcards (e.g. "*.substack.com") and path filtering (e.g. "openai.com/blog").

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the file-parser plugin for this request. Defaults to true.
Set to false to disable the response-healing plugin for this request. Defaults to true.
Set to false to disable the context-compression plugin for this request. Defaults to true.

plugins.description: Plugins you want to enable for this request, including their settings.

route.description: **DEPRECATED** Use providers.sort.partition instead. Backwards-compatible alias for providers.sort.partition. Accepts legacy values: "fallback" (maps to "model"), "sort" (maps to "none").

session_id.description: A unique identifier for grouping related requests (e.g., a conversation or agent workflow) for observability. If provided in both the request body and the x-session-id header, the body value takes precedence. Maximum of 256 characters.

trace.description: Metadata for observability and tracing. Known keys (trace_id, trace_name, span_name, generation_name, parent_span_id) have special handling. Additional keys are passed through as custom metadata to configured broadcast destinations.

messages.description: List of messages for the conversation

top_logprobs.description: Number of top log probabilities to return (0-20)

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens (deprecated, use max_completion_tokens). Note: some providers enforce a minimum of 16.

metadata.description: Key-value pairs for additional object information (max 16 pairs, 64 char keys, 512 char values)

effort.description: Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models

image_config.description: Provider-specific image configuration options. Keys and values vary by model/provider. See https://openrouter.ai/docs/guides/overview/multimodal/image-generation for more details.

modalities.description: Output modalities for the response. Supported values are "text", "image", and "audio".

cache_control.description: Enable automatic prompt caching. When set, the system automatically applies cache breakpoints to the last cacheable block in the request. Currently supported for Anthropic Claude models.

service_tier.description: The service tier to use for processing this request.

uptime_last_5m.description: Uptime percentage over the last 5 minutes, calculated as successful requests / (successful + error requests) * 100. Rate-limited requests are excluded. Returns null if insufficient data.

uptime_last_1d.description: Uptime percentage over the last 1 day, calculated as successful requests / (successful + error requests) * 100. Rate-limited requests are excluded. Returns null if insufficient data.

allOf.description: Throughput percentiles in tokens per second over the last 30 minutes. Throughput measures output token generation speed. Only visible when authenticated with an API key or cookie; returns null for unauthenticated requests.

get.description: Get information on the API key associated with the current authentication session

label.description: Human-readable label for the API key

limit.description: Spending limit for the API key in USD

usage.description: Total OpenRouter credit usage (in USD) for the API key

usage_daily.description: OpenRouter credit usage (in USD) for the current UTC day

usage_weekly.description: OpenRouter credit usage (in USD) for the current UTC week (Monday-Sunday)

usage_monthly.description: OpenRouter credit usage (in USD) for the current UTC month

byok_usage.description: Total external BYOK usage (in USD) for the API key

byok_usage_daily.description: External BYOK usage (in USD) for the current UTC day

byok_usage_weekly.description: External BYOK usage (in USD) for the current UTC week (Monday-Sunday)

byok_usage_monthly.description: External BYOK usage (in USD) for current UTC month

is_free_tier.description: Whether this is a free tier API key

is_management_key.description: Whether this is a management key

is_provisioning_key.description: Whether this is a management key

limit_reset.description: Type of limit reset for the API key

include_byok_in_limit.description: Whether to include external BYOK usage in the credit limit

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the API key expires, or null if no expiration

creator_user_id.description: The user ID of the key creator. For organization-owned keys, this is the member who created the key. For individual users, this is the user's own ID.

requests.description: Number of requests allowed per interval

note.example: This field is deprecated and safe to ignore.

rate_limit.description: Legacy rate limit information about a key. Will always return -1.

example.note: This field is deprecated and safe to ignore.

rate_limit.note: This field is deprecated and safe to ignore.
This field is deprecated and safe to ignore.

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid credentials

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error

post.summary: Exchange authorization code for API key
post.description: Exchange an authorization code from the PKCE flow for a user-controlled API key

code.description: The authorization code received from the OAuth redirect

code_verifier.description: The code verifier if code_challenge was used in the authorization request

code_challenge_method.description: The method used to generate the code challenge

200.description: Successfully exchanged code for an API key

key.description: The API key to use for OpenRouter requests

user_id.description: User ID associated with the API key

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters or malformed input

403.description: Forbidden - Authentication successful but insufficient permissions

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error

post.description: Create an authorization code for the PKCE flow to generate a user-controlled API key

callback_url.description: The callback URL to redirect to after authorization. Note, only https URLs on ports 443 and 3000 are allowed.

code_challenge.description: PKCE code challenge for enhanced security

code_challenge_method.description: The method used to generate the code challenge

limit.description: Credit limit for the API key to be created

expires_at.description: Optional expiration time for the API key to be created

key_label.description: Optional custom label for the API key. Defaults to the app name if not provided.

usage_limit_type.description: Optional credit limit reset interval. When set, the credit limit resets on this interval.

id.description: The authorization code ID to use in the exchange request

app_id.description: The application ID associated with this auth code

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the auth code was created

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters or malformed input

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid credentials

409.description: Conflict - App upsert conflict during auth code creation

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error

post.description: Submits an embedding request to the embeddings router

schema.description: Not used for embeddings - embeddings do not support streaming

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters or malformed input

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid credentials

402.description: Payment Required - Insufficient credits or quota to complete request

404.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error

524.description: Cloudflare Timeout - Provider request timed out at CDN edge

529.description: Provider Overloaded - Provider is temporarily overloaded

get.description: Returns a list of all available embeddings models and their properties

200.description: Returns a list of embeddings models
